routineText:
09:00 — Wake up & go to Work
09:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
13:00
13:00 — Black coffee + 1 tsp of sugar

-----------------------
| 14:00 — 🌅 Breakfast
|
| — khobz complet 35g
| — 5 white of eggs boiled
| — 3 yolk of eggs boiled
| — 5g of olive oil
| — mint tea + 1 tsp of sugar
| — cumin & salt
| — oat 35g + water
| — 1 scoop of protein powder
| — 1 avocado 200g whole
-----------------------

14:00 — return to Work
14:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
18:00
18:00 — Out from work

-----------------------
| 20:30 — ☀️ Lunch (light, pre-football)
| — kefta 90/10 110g
| — khobz complet 35g
-----------------------

22:00 — ⚽ Football training (1h30)

23:30 — 4 dates + water (post-training)

-----------------------
| 23:45 — 🌙 Post-match Dinner
| — kefta 90/10 140g (remainder, deferred from lunch)
| — 300g legume sauté (carrot, courgette, onion)
| — 400g potatoes (boiled)
| — 1 small chicken leg 150g (skin removed)
| — khobz complet 35g
| — 1 scoop of protein powder
| — 1 perly nature
| — 2g Almonds
| — 2g Walnuts
| — 2g Cashews
| — 2g Pistachios
| — 1 kiwi
| — 1 banana
-----------------------

23:55 — 1 apple 100g (snack)

01:00 — Sleep

adjustments.from: Kefta 250g + 300g légumes sautés all at 20:30 lunch, 1h30 before football
adjustments.to: Kefta split 110g (pre-match lunch) / 140g (post-match dinner) — légumes 300g moved entirely to post-match
adjustments.reason: A full fatty (kefta) + fibrous (légumes) meal 1h30 before an intense football session risks cramping and gas mid-match. Lighter, faster-digesting lunch now; the rest becomes the post-match recovery meal.

adjustments.from: Post-match dinner short by ~570 kcal / 133g carbs of the training target
adjustments.to: Added 300g potatoes to dinner; 4 dates + water already logged post-training
adjustments.reason: Dates right after the match were a good fast-carb move for glycogen refill. Potatoes at dinner (clean carb, low fat, no gas-list ingredient) close most of the remaining training-day carb/calorie gap without overloading fat or fiber further.

adjustments.from: Still ~270 kcal / 61g carbs short after dates + potatoes
adjustments.to: Added 1 small chicken leg 150g, +100g more potatoes (400g total), khobz complet 35g, and 1 banana
adjustments.reason: Requested as an extra addition. Chicken + extra potato + banana close the carb gap almost exactly (99% of target). Trade-off: khobz complet is now also at dinner — the chicken leg's fat pushes total fat to 140% of target on a day that was already fat-sufficient.

adjustments.from: Breakfast logged as bread-free with oat bumped to 55g
adjustments.to: Corrected — khobz complet 35g was actually eaten at breakfast, oat stayed at the original 35g
adjustments.reason: Mehdi confirmed the raw breakfast was eaten as originally logged, not the bread-free version. Net macro effect is nearly neutral (+9 kcal / +1g carbs), but bread is now used three times today (breakfast, lunch, dinner) instead of two — a bigger gas-rule violation than previously flagged.

adjustments.from: Day logged as complete at 2,552 kcal
adjustments.to: Added 100g apple as a post-dinner snack (23:55)
adjustments.reason: Requested as an extra addition after the day was already logged. Clean, fat-free carb (13.8g) with no gas-list ingredients — but it pushes total calories to 2,613 (313 over target), tipping calories from warn into bad status.

verdict.text_html: Training day fully refueled — 2,613 kcal, carbs at 105% of target — but fat overshot to 140%, calories ran 313 over, and bread was used three times today.

coverage.name: Calories
coverage.note: 313 over target — the post-dinner apple tipped calories from warn into bad

coverage.name: Protein
coverage.note: Well past the minimum — not a problem on a training day, just generous

coverage.name: Carbs
coverage.note: Breakfast bread + apple nudged carbs from 99% to 105% — still a clean landing

coverage.name: Fat
coverage.note: Chicken leg's 20.6g fat pushed an already-sufficient fat day well over

coverage.name: Fiber
coverage.note: Potatoes, khobz, banana, and the post-dinner apple add up — comfortably covered

coverage.name: Gas / bloat risk
coverage.note: Bread used three times today (breakfast, lunch, dinner) + a very large late second dinner — the worst gas-risk day logged so far

coverage.name: Protocol adherence
coverage.note: Bread three times (breakfast, lunch, dinner) and dinner at 23:45 — both known deviations; cumin ✓

coverage.name: Vitamin A
coverage.note: Unchanged — carrot remains the dominant Vit A source

coverage.name: Potassium
coverage.note: Chicken + banana + extra potato + apple nearly closed this out — up from 36% at the start of the day

good: Carbs landed at 105% of the training target — banana, potato, khobz, and the post-dinner apple closed the gap cleanly
The apple added fiber and vitamin C with zero fat — the right kind of extra if calories were going to run over anyway
Most micronutrient gaps closed by the late additions — potassium 36%→96%, magnesium ~49%→~99%, thiamine ~54%→~103%
Protein comfortably past the 165g floor (198g) — no concern despite the warn color
bad: Fat now 140% of target — the chicken leg pushed an already-fat-sufficient day well over
Bread used three times today (breakfast, lunch, dinner) — a bigger gas-rule violation than earlier flagged, now confirmed at all three meals
Calories now 313 over target (2,613 kcal) — the post-dinner apple tipped this from warn into bad
Very large, very late second dinner (23:45) — most of the day's intake landed in the last hour
loggedItems: Khobz complet 35g (breakfast — bread used 3× today: breakfast, lunch, dinner)
Khobz complet 35g (dinner — bread used 3× today, accepted)

fullTable.note: Chicken leg adds ~27g on top of an already-solid protein day
3 × 1L blocks from schedule, plus water with the post-training dates
Extra potato, khobz (now 3 portions), banana, and the apple push this comfortably over
Unchanged — walnuts 2g only (0.13g ALA), no fatty fish
Unchanged — structural gap without fatty fish
Chicken + khobz + extra potato push this over target for the first time
Kefta + egg yolks + chicken
Chicken + banana + khobz + potato close nearly all of this gap
Unchanged — perly + whey are the main sources, still the weakest spot
Chicken adds ~4mg on top of kefta's full coverage
Chicken + banana + extra potato + apple — from 36% at breakfast to 96% by bedtime
Banana + khobz + potato add ~56µg — closer but not quite there
Banana + extra potato + apple add on top of an already-strong day
Unchanged — carrot + egg yolks
Unchanged — structural gap, none of tonight's additions carry iodine
Unchanged — avocado + olive oil + yolks
Unchanged — kiwi + avocado
Chicken + banana + potato push this well past target
Chicken + khobz add on top of eggs + kefta
Khobz + chicken + potato + banana finally close this gap
Unchanged — egg whites + kefta
Chicken + khobz + potato + banana push this well past target
Khobz + potato + chicken add a bit more on top of an already-covered day
Chicken + potato + khobz add ~117mg on top of egg yolks (dominant)
Fromage frais mild — consider swapping for raib for better gut value
Khobz (now 3 portions today) and chicken push this up — still within normal daily range, but climbing
Carrot, kiwi, avocado, oat, potato skin, banana, apple
Chicken + khobz + potato add on top of whey + kefta + yolks — already well above
Banana + khobz + potato push this over target
Unchanged — oat remains the main grain source
Unchanged — egg yolks + avocado + kefta
Unchanged — 3 egg yolks provide 75µg
